prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021年最低位次约1299名（当年选科要求为物理必选，数据偏高），2022年约343名，2024年约348名，2025年约310名；近4年（2022-2025）位次稳定在310-348之间，2025年基准约310名，呈小幅前移趋势；该校在天津市2021-2025年招生计划均为20人，2026年计划仍为20人，连续6年保持不变，无扩招或缩招信号。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2021-2026年连续稳居第7名，属全国顶尖高校（Top20），理工类院校中排名最高之一；2025年声誉偏正面（李政道先生逝世，他曾为中国科学技术大学少年班创立'点亮明灯'，提升学校声誉）；2026年声誉偏负面（时任教授因贪污助不合资格学生入读硕士课程被判刑）；抖音热度为高热（总排名第12，综合热度约418万），短视频平台曝光量大，报考关注度较高；2021-2025年均无投档线异常/断档记录；第五轮学科评估A-及以上共19个学科，其中A+学科8个（化学、地球物理学、天文学、安全科学与工程、数学、物理学、生物学、科学技术史），A学科4个（工商管理、材料科学与工程、管理科学与工程、计算机科学与技术），A-学科7个；招生专业覆盖数学、物理、化学、生物、计算机、电子信息、力学等方向，与优势学科高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业持续高热推荐，人工智能、数学/统计等专业为推荐；天津考生总数2021年54025人→2025年71938人→2026年约82000人（较2025年增长约14%），考生规模持续扩大，竞争加剧；该校位于安徽省合肥市，非天津本地高校；天津为综合改革省份，该校在天津招生选科要求为物理、化学(2科必选)，对选科有明确限制；该校在天津招生计划稳定（20人），占比较小，地域偏好因素影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合以上因素：历年位次近4年稳定在310-348名区间，2025年基准约310名；招生计划连续6年不变，无扩招信号；天津考生总数2026年预计约82000人，较2025年增长约14%，竞争明显加剧，是推动位次后移的最关键因素；学校层次顶尖、优势学科极强、抖音热度高，对考生吸引力不减。在招生计划不变而考生数大幅增加的供需格局下，预计2026年最低位次较2025年小幅后移。预测最低位次约330名，区间292–368名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 量子信息科学（理科试验班类，量子未来技术试点班）
- 工科试验班（科技英才班，含华夏计算机科技英才班、信息科技英才班等）
- 计算机类（计算机科学与技术）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 数学类（含华罗庚数学科技英才班、中法数学英才班）
- 物理学类（含严济慈物理科技英才班等）
- 电子信息类（含信息科技英才班、集成电路科技英才班等）
- 人工智能。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 工科试验班（力学及航天、人形机器人、未来能源及安全）
- 理科试验班类（拔尖计划科技英才班，含化学/生物/空间方向）
- 理科试验班类（拔尖计划科技英才班，含数学/物理方向）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 中国科学技术大学在天津市仅设'综合'一个科类（选科要求物理、化学必选），招生专业均为顶尖理工方向。预测位次约330名，区间292-368名。位次在预测区间内（292-368名）建议以二档专业为主力填报，一档专业（量子信息科学、科技英才班、计算机类）可作为冲刺志愿；位次明显优于区间下限（<292名）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（约368名）建议以三档专业保底。该校所有专业均依托A类学科，整体实力极强，各档位之间位次差距较小，建议结合个人兴趣和学科评估等级综合选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2021, the minimum ranking was approximately 1299 (that year's subject requirement was physics mandatory, data is high), in 2022 approximately 343, in 2024 approximately 348, in 2025 approximately 310; in the past 4 years (2022-2025), the ranking has been stable between 310-348, with a baseline of about 310 in 2025, showing a slight forward trend; the university's enrollment plan in Tianjin from 2021 to 2025 has been 20 students, and the 2026 plan remains 20 students, unchanged for 6 consecutive years, with no signals of expansion or contraction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; Soft Science Chinese University Rankings 2021-2026 consecutively ranked 7th, belonging to the top universities nationwide (Top20), one of the highest ranked among science and engineering universities; in 2025, reputation is slightly positive (Li Zhengdao passed away, he 'lit a lamp' for the founding of the USTC Junior Class, enhancing the university's reputation); in 2026, reputation is slightly negative (a professor was sentenced for corruption in helping unqualified students enroll in master's programs); Douyin popularity is high (ranked 12th overall, comprehensive popularity about 4.18 million), with large exposure on short video platforms, attracting high application attention; from 2021 to 2025, there were no abnormal admission score lines/gaps; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 19 disciplines at A- or above, including 8 A+ disciplines (Chemistry, Geophysics, Astronomy, Safety Science and Engineering, Mathematics, Physics, Biology, History of Science and Technology), 4 A disciplines (Business Administration, Materials Science and Engineering, Management Science and Engineering, Computer Science and Technology), and 7 A- disciplines; the enrollment majors cover Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, Biology, Computer Science, Electronic Information, Mechanics, etc., highly matching the advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation, etc., are continuously highly recommended; Artificial Intelligence, Mathematics/Statistics, etc., are recommended; total number of Tianjin examinees: 54,025 in 2021 → 71,938 in 2025 → approximately 82,000 in 2026 (an increase of about 14% compared to 2025), the examinee scale continues to expand, intensifying competition; the university is located in Hefei, Anhui Province, not a local Tianjin university; Tianjin is a comprehensive reform province, and the university's subject requirements for enrollment in Tianjin are Physics and Chemistry (both mandatory), with clear restrictions on subject selection; the university's enrollment plan in Tianjin is stable (20 students), accounting for a small proportion, with limited influence from regional preference factors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the above factors: historical rankings have been stable in the 310-348 range for the past 4 years, with a baseline of about 310 in 2025; the enrollment plan has been unchanged for 6 consecutive years, with no expansion signals; the total number of Tianjin examinees in 2026 is expected to be about 82,000, an increase of about 14% compared to 2025, significantly intensifying competition, which is the most critical factor driving the ranking backward; the university's level is top-tier, its advantageous disciplines are extremely strong, and its Douyin popularity is high, maintaining strong appeal to applicants. Under the supply-demand situation of unchanged enrollment plan but a substantial increase in examinees, it is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will slightly shift backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 330, with a range of 292-368.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Quantum Information Science (Science Pilot Class, Quantum Future Technology Pilot Class)
- Engineering Pilot Class (Science and Technology Elite Class, including Huaxia Computer Science and Technology Elite Class, Information Science and Technology Elite Class, etc.)
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Mathematics (including Hua Luogeng Mathematics Science and Technology Elite Class, Sino-French Mathematics Elite Class)
- Physics (including Yan Jici Physics Science and Technology Elite Class, etc.)
- Electronic Information (including Information Science and Technology Elite Class, Integrated Circuit Science and Technology Elite Class, etc.)
- Artificial Intelligence.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Engineering Pilot Class (Mechanics and Aerospace, Humanoid Robots, Future Energy and Safety)
- Science Pilot Class (Top Talent Plan Science and Technology Elite Class, including Chemistry/Biology/Space directions)
- Science Pilot Class (Top Talent Plan Science and Technology Elite Class, including Mathematics/Physics directions).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The University of Science and Technology of China only offers one subject category 'Comprehensive' in Tianjin (subject requirements: Physics and Chemistry mandatory), with all enrollment majors being top-tier science and engineering directions. The predicted ranking is about 330, with a range of 292-368. For rankings within the predicted range (292-368), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, with Tier 1 majors (Quantum Information Science, Science and Technology Elite Class, Computer Science) as reach options; for rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<292), focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors; for rankings near the upper limit of the range (about 368), it is recommended to use Tier 3 majors as safety options. All majors at this university are based on A-level disciplines, with extremely strong overall strength, and the ranking differences between tiers are small. It is recommended to choose based on personal interests and discipline evaluation grades comprehensively.

_translation.university_name_en: University of Science and Technology of China
